description: A vertical text graphic on a red and blue background with a faint pattern of binary digits and network lines. White text at the top reads USCIS plays a vital role in protecting the U.S. Smaller white text below reads Our background checks uncover criminal histories, and our law enforcement partners take action to safeguard American communities. A Department of Homeland Security seal sits near the bottom above the words U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services.
notable_text: USCIS plays a vital role in protecting the U.S.; Our background checks uncover criminal histories, and our law enforcement partners take action to safeguard American communities.; U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services
